title: Assertion fault when deleting a table out from under a SELECT
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,b);
SELECT a, eval('DELETE FROM t1'), b FROM t1 ORDER BY a DESC;
key_bug_features: Deleting a table during a SELECT statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t2(name, value) VALUES('item1', 10.5), ('item2', NULL), ('item3', 20.0);
CREATE TABLE t3(ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t2(id));
SELECT t2.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE t3.ref_id = t2.id), t2.value FROM t2 ORDER BY t2.value DESC;
